reviews.comment:
PÉSIMO SERVICIO, MUY MALA ATENCIÓN. Quise cargar 200lts de combustible y me hicieron esperar 2hs porque no era horario para hacer ese tipo de cargas. HORRIBLE EL SERVICIO, PESIMOOOO.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, very poor customer service. I wanted to fill up 200 liters of fuel, but they made me wait two hours because it wasn't the designated time for filling up. Horrible service, terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURweHM2UFhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Solo como para cargar combustible, y seguir viaje  los baños sucios, poco espacio para estacionamiento. Muy abandonado todo.

(Translated by Google)
Only to fill up with fuel, and continue traveling, the bathrooms are dirty, little space for parking. Everything very abandoned.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Sin factura, sin tarjetas. Dudo que la nafta sea de ypf. Surtidores del año 80

(Translated by Google)
No receipt, no cards. I doubt the gas is from YPF. Pumps from the 80s.
